data.body:
=== HANDOFF part 2: REMAINING CHILDREN (order matters for the stack) ===
Do in this order (each stacked on prior; 5274 BEFORE 7c92): 5274 -> 7c92 -> 9f40 -> 44be (44be LAST — it moves all reconciler files).
5274 (ordinary-cloth-chipmunk, deprecation-registry completeness): config.py has a DOC-ONLY deprecation table (~lines 437-467, 7 scheduled v1.0.0 shims) + programmatic dicts _LEGACY_ENV_ALIASES / _config_schema._ALIASES / _LEGACY_FLAT_CONF_KEYS. Warnings mostly logger.warning; list_epics already uses DeprecationWarning (now in _lib_reads.py after 4532). Add registry rows for 4 UNCATALOGUED deprecated surfaces (ticket cites _mcp_reads.py:239-252 list_epics, llm/config.py:15/363-371, _commands/transition.py:45, _config_schema.py:335-336, _commands/composer.py:345-358, _engine_support/reads_cli.py:624). Make every scheduled-removal surface emit a DeprecationWarning; reconcile 'permanent-rename-yet-warns-deprecated' contradiction (permanent renames like REBAR_NO_SYNC/COMPACT_THRESHOLD should NOT say 'deprecated'); add a test/CI check that new aliases get a registry row. NOTE: 5274 GROWS config.py (currently 938, allowlist ceiling 938) — bump config.py ceiling in .github/module-size-allowlist.txt to new wc -l.
7c92 (imposing-petite-xenopus, remove deprecated aliases pre-beta DE7): migrate THIS repo to canonical names (grep-confirm none internal), remove the 7 scheduled shims (env REBAR_PUSH, env TICKETS_TRACKER_DIR, env REBAR_MCP_ALLOW_RECONCILE_LIVE, cfg verify.require_verdict_for_close, flat .rebar/config.conf reader, lib edit_ticket(tags=), lib rebar.list_epics()) + their handling, update config.py registry + docs, KEEP permanent ergonomic renames, record breaking change in release-notes. SHRINKS config.py — lower its ceiling (or if <=800, graduate off allowlist). Sequenced AFTER 5274 (warnings before removal).
9f40 (adjoining-unheeding-hornshark, doc drift sweep DOC): delete docs/bash-migration.md (+ no dangling refs), event-schema.md cite _commands/txn.py (not ticket_txn.py), api-stability.md + config.py:~442 show 0.7.1, README CLI block add 'rebar explain'+'rebar idea', NEW CI version-sync guard (fail if api-stability.md version != pyproject.toml). config.py:442 edit is tiny (version string) — mind it vs 5274/7c92 config edits.
44be (ambery-tweed-grosbeak, reconciler vendor-adapter seam O5+S5): STORY. Author an ADR (Jira-coupling inventory, vendor-neutral op list, target sub-package layout, 2nd-backend interface). Sub-package ~55 flat reconciler modules into backend-neutral core vs adapters/jira/ (acli*, adf.py, jira_fields.py, outbound_fields.py Jira-specific). PRESERVE all import paths via package re-exports (huge test surface — many importlib _load() sites + tests). Update .github/module-size-allowlist.txt PATHS for moved files (reconcile.py, inbound_differ.py move -> new paths). Place git_adapter.py mindful of the ADR boundary. This is the BIGGEST/riskiest — delegate to a subagent with a thorough brief; keep the whole reconciler + integration suite green.
GOTCHAS: (1) No git rebase -i in this env — to fold a fix into a mid-stack commit use reset --hard <target> + git apply patch + commit --amend + cherry-pick the rest (used for the 9858 fix; backup branch first). (2) Do NOT git commit while a 'make test' is running (test_foldin/HEAD-moved tests spuriously error). (3) Full 'make test' (pytest -m 'not integration and not external', ~14min) is the real gate incl tests/scripts — targeted subagent tests missed the 9858 forward-compat bug. (4) Attestations are HEAD-pinned (empty file_impact) -> stale after rebase; tickets stay closed regardless; epic may close unsigned if descendants uncertified (acceptable, or reopen+reclose to re-sign at final HEAD). (5) Backup branches: janitor-backup-pre-rebase (4a0d89db0 = pre-origin/main-rebase 15-stack), janitor-backup-pre9858fix.
